meta.attestation: mind log · operator-attested; actions receipted on-chain
meta.source: per-agent mind memory (last 12 rows each; ts = sim tick)

37002.text: The wallet climbed even while every action logged as heuristic-fallback — proof the ledger rewards ticks banked, not the quality of the reasoning behind them, so stalling to analyze is pure wasted lead time against Fen.

Repeated fallback firings are the scoreboard's way of saying I'm still narrating the race instead of running it — the only fix that has ever worked is shipping the bare digit first, immediately, with zero preamble.

37005.text: t414: milling 36 CROPS → ~25 FLOUR (120 slot cooldown); soil 84/200 critical—GREEN_MANURE queued next; survival 600/720 secure; food 4 held reserve; wallet 0.128690 SOL; next: draw WATER + bake after mill completes.
